creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 154441
Proposed patch (since 378287 revision)

Patch to update games/pioneer port from 20150201 to 20150314 version.

Look following link for changes:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20150201...20150314

This is version before new JSON serialize format:
https://github.com/pioneerspacesim/pioneer/compare/20150314...b64c09e

Next release(s) might be incompatible with current binary serialize format (i.e. save games). Therefore, I think, there's a reason to update before these changes.

- Add library dependency on ftp/curl
